title: New Hire Onboarding Checklist
subtitle: Welcome to the team! Work through each item below at your own pace. Click an item to see instructions and a link to the resource, then mark it complete. Your progress is saved on this device.

items.title: Welcome & first-day schedule
items.description: Review your first-day agenda, where to go, who to ask for, and what to bring on day one.

items.title: Sign your employment agreement & NDA
items.description: Electronically sign your offer paperwork, confidentiality agreement, and any outstanding documents in the HR portal.

items.title: Complete employment verification (I-9)
items.description: Provide your identity and work-authorization documents within your first three days of employment.

items.title: Complete tax withholding forms (W-4)
items.description: Fill out your federal and state tax withholding elections so payroll can be processed correctly.

items.title: Set up direct deposit
items.description: Add your bank account details in the payroll system so your paychecks arrive automatically.

items.title: Add an emergency contact
items.description: Enter at least one emergency contact in your employee profile so we can reach someone if needed.

items.title: Get your employee ID & badge photo
items.description: Stop by the front desk (or upload a photo) to get your security badge and employee ID issued.

items.title: Order business cards
items.description: Submit your name, title, and contact details to order your company business cards.

items.title: Review the employee handbook
items.description: Read the employee handbook covering policies, expectations, and your rights and responsibilities, then acknowledge it.

items.title: Office tour & facilities map
items.description: Find meeting rooms, restrooms, kitchens, printers, quiet areas, and emergency exits at your office location.

items.title: Pick up your laptop & equipment
items.description: Collect your laptop, monitor, and peripherals from IT, and sign the equipment agreement.

items.title: Set up your company email
items.description: Log in to your company email account, set your display name, and add your email signature using the company template.

items.title: Enroll in multi-factor authentication
items.description: Set up MFA on your phone or hardware key. This is required before you can access most company systems.

items.title: Install required software
items.description: Install the standard software bundle for your role from the self-service portal.

items.title: Join team chat channels
items.description: Sign in to the company chat tool and join your team, department, and company-wide announcement channels.

items.title: Set up VPN access
items.description: Install and configure the VPN client so you can securely access internal systems when working remotely.

items.title: Set up the password manager
items.description: Activate your company password manager account and move any shared credentials into it. Never store passwords in documents or notes.

items.title: IT FAQ & helpdesk
items.description: Bookmark the IT FAQ and learn how to open a helpdesk ticket when you run into technical issues.

items.title: Complete security awareness training
items.description: Finish the mandatory security training covering phishing, data handling, and device security. Due within your first two weeks.

items.title: Set up your phone / softphone
items.description: Configure your desk phone or softphone app, record your voicemail greeting, and add your number to your profile.

items.title: Company benefits overview
items.description: Get a full overview of your benefits package: health coverage, retirement, time off, perks, and enrollment deadlines.

items.title: Enroll in health insurance
items.description: Compare medical plans and enroll yourself (and any dependents) before your enrollment window closes.

items.title: Enroll in dental & vision
items.description: Review and elect dental and vision coverage options during your new-hire enrollment window.

items.title: Set up retirement / 401(k) contributions
items.description: Choose your contribution percentage and investments, and review the company match policy.

items.title: Review life & disability insurance
items.description: Review the company-paid coverage and decide whether to elect additional voluntary coverage.

items.title: PTO policy & holiday calendar
items.description: Learn how vacation and sick time accrue, how to request time off, and which company holidays are observed this year.

items.title: Confirm your working hours & location
items.description: Record your standard working hours, time zone, and remote/hybrid schedule in your employee profile.

items.title: Commuter benefits & parking
items.description: Sign up for pre-tax transit benefits or register your vehicle for a parking pass.

items.title: Wellness program & gym discounts
items.description: Explore wellness reimbursements, gym discounts, and mental-health resources available to all employees.

items.title: Employee assistance program (EAP)
items.description: Learn about the free, confidential counseling and support services available to you and your family.

items.title: Meet your manager (first 1:1)
items.description: Schedule your first one-on-one with your manager to align on expectations, priorities, and how you'll work together.

items.title: Meet your onboarding buddy
items.description: Connect with your assigned onboarding buddy — your go-to person for everyday questions during your first months.

items.title: Team introductions
items.description: Meet your immediate teammates and learn what each person works on and how your role fits in.

items.title: Org chart & who's who
items.description: Browse the org chart to understand company structure, departments, and key leaders.

items.title: Company mission, vision & values
items.description: Read about why the company exists, where it's headed, and the values that guide how we work.

items.title: Communication norms & meeting etiquette
items.description: Learn which channels we use for what, response-time expectations, and how we run effective meetings.

items.title: Join an employee resource group
items.description: Browse our employee resource groups and communities, and join any that interest you.

items.title: Company events & social calendar
items.description: Check out upcoming all-hands meetings, team events, and social activities you can join.

items.title: Set your 30/60/90-day goals
items.description: Work with your manager to define what success looks like in your first 30, 60, and 90 days.

items.title: Schedule intro coffee chats
items.description: Book short intro chats with the cross-functional partners you'll work with most often.

items.title: Time tracking & timesheets
items.description: Learn how and when to submit your timesheet, if your role requires time tracking.

items.title: Expense reporting tool
items.description: Set up your expense account, review the expense policy, and learn how to submit receipts for reimbursement.

items.title: Project management tool overview
items.description: Get access to the project tracking tool your team uses and learn how work is planned and assigned.

items.title: Internal wiki & knowledge base
items.description: Bookmark the internal wiki — the first place to look for documentation, how-tos, and team pages.

items.title: Complete required compliance training
items.description: Finish the mandatory compliance courses (code of conduct, anti-harassment, data privacy) by their due dates.

items.title: Review your role-specific training plan
items.description: Go through the training plan for your specific role and schedule any required sessions.

items.title: Brand & style guidelines
items.description: Review logo usage, templates, and writing style guidelines for anything you create or share externally.

items.title: Travel booking & policy
items.description: Learn how to book business travel through the company travel tool and what the travel policy covers.

items.title: Payroll calendar & paystubs
items.description: Find the payroll calendar, learn when you'll be paid, and see how to access your paystubs online.

items.title: Complete the 30-day onboarding survey
items.description: After your first month, tell us how onboarding went so we can improve it for future new hires.
